name: Kwame Osei
bio: Former SpaceX engineer turned Afrofuturist. Kwame leads the company's vision of a technologically sovereign Africa.

name: Amina Diallo
bio: Deep learning researcher from MIT Media Lab. Amina architects the AI systems powering every WSUITS product.

name: Chidi Okonkwo
bio: Scaled infrastructure at Flutterwave and Andela. Chidi ensures our products ship fast and run reliably.

name: Zara Kibwe
bio: Former Apple designer who believes the best technology is invisible. Zara crafts intuitive experiences for African users.

name: Elijah Mwangi
bio: Roboticist who built Africa's first open-source farm robot. Elijah leads the hardware engineering behind AgriBot and AfriDrone.

name: Nyambura Kimani
bio: Former UN advisor on technology policy. Nyambura secures government and institutional partnerships across the continent.
